hooks.command: node -e "const c=JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'{}').command||'');const blocked=[/\brm\s+-rf\s+[\\/~]/i,/\bformat\s+[a-z]:/i,/\bshutdown\b/i,/\breboot\b/i,/\bmkfs\b/i,/\bdd\s+if=/i,/\bdel\s+\\/[sS]/i,/\breg\s+(add|delete)/i,/\bchmod\s+777\s+\\//i,/\bgit\s+(push|reset\s+--hard|rebase|force)/i,/\bnpm\s+(install|i)\s+-g/i,/\bpip\s+install/i,/\bbrew\s+install/i,/\bapt(-get)?\s+(install|remove|purge)/i,/\bsudo\b/i,/\bpowershell.*-[eE]nc/i,/\bcurl.*\|\s*(ba)?sh/i];if(blocked.some(r=>r.test(c))){console.error('BLOCKED: This command is not allowed for safety.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const p=(JSON.parse(process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'{}').file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/');const blocked=[/\/app\/(main|renderer|preload|ws-server)\.js$/,/\/app\/(style\.css|index\.html)$/,/\.claude\/settings\.json$/,/\.claude\/commands\//,/CLAUDE\.md$/,/version\.json$/,/package\.json$/,/package-lock\.json$/,/\.(ssh|gnupg)\//,/\.(env|bashrc|zshrc|profile)$/,/(etc|Windows[\\/]System)/i];if(blocked.some(r=>r.test(p))){console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot modify app source or system files.');process.exit(2)}"

Stop.prompt: Check if any new content was generated this session (new folders in results/ created today). If yes, append a one-line entry to memory.md Run Log: date | brand | product | type | result. Keep it brief. If no new content, do nothing.
